sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a stressful winter and spring due to onboarding new employees and staffing shortages. He also reports a rough year with depression and occasional difficulty sleeping, needing more sleep. He reports chest pain and difficulty sleeping. He reports a grade two systolic ejection murmur that he had before.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals clear lungs, regular heart sounds, a grade two systolic ejection murmur, and no edema. Weight gain is noted. Blood pressure is mildly low.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a history of depression and hypertension. The murmur is not clinically significant.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Order a refill of zoloft 50 milligrams daily. Continue lisinopril 5 milligrams a day. Schedule a follow-up in one month and again in three months.
